description: Standardize SQLite schema definitions for Cloudflare D1 using Drizzle ORM.
conditions: Whenever defining new database tables for Cloudflare D1.
actions: Use crypto.randomUUID() for all primary key text IDs to avoid sequence locking and improve edge performance.
Always use 'integer' with { mode: 'timestamp' } for date columns and default to sql`(strftime('%s', 'now'))` for SQLite compatibility.
Store complex unstructured AI outputs (like hiring committee notes) as JSON fields.
